headline: Zai Lab Showcases 54% Brain Metastases Response for ZL-1310 ADC in SCLC at AACR Investor Call
summary: Zai Lab (NASDAQ:ZLAB) hosted an investor call tied to the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) meeting to highlight new data for its DLL3-targeted antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) zocilurtatug pelitecan (zoci; ZL-1310) in small cell lung cancer (SCLC) with brain metastases and in extrap
